Wescayl

Scale beyond borders with Wescayl.

Your end-to-end partner for launching, shipping, and growing your brand globally.

Wescayl is not just a logistics company, it is the infrastructure layer that enables India's best brands to reach global markets.

Wescayl is the infrastructure layer that takes India's best brands global.

Not a logistics company. Not a marketing agency. The layer that sits between them and makes both work.

Indian brands are winning at home.
The demand is proven. The product quality is real. The manufacturing is world-class. Brands that have built ₹50Cr+ businesses in India are ready to scale but the moment they try to go global, they hit a wall.
Logistics gets your goods there. It does not get them sold.
Moving boxes from Mumbai to a UK warehouse is one problem. Getting those boxes discovered, listed correctly, stocked by UK retailers, and marketed to British consumers who have never heard of your brand that is an entirely different operation.
Wescayl was built to close that gap.
We combine logistics infrastructure and marketing intelligence into one service, one partner, one invoice. The only thing a brand needs to do is make a great product. We handle everything that happens after the factory gates.

The UK online marketplace. The numbers that matter.

Three reasons why brands choose Wescayl

UK storage from ₹500/Pallet per week
Store your high-selling SKUs in the UK for as low as ₹500 per pallet. Get your inventory closer to your customers without the overheads of setting up your own warehouse.*
* T&C applies. Pricing subject to shipment volume, pallet dimensions, and storage duration.
Reduced freight through consolidation
Partner with us to consolidate your shipments alongside other brands and benefit from significantly reduced freight rates. Shared containers, shared costs no compromise on speed or reliability.
Returns that pay for themselves
Streamline your returns process with Wescayl and turn reverse logistics into a cost-saving advantage. We handle inspection, repackaging, and restocking so every return becomes an opportunity, not a write-off.

Sell on the UK's top marketplaces seamlessly

Get seamless integrations with top UK marketplaces like Amazon UK, eBay, and TikTok Shop to streamline your sales channels.

Amazon UK
407M monthly visits · Largest UK marketplace
eBay UK
298M monthly visits · #2 UK marketplace
TikTok Shop UK
Fastest growing · Social commerce leader

Top categories on UK marketplaces

Health & Beauty 9% of eBay, 30% of Amazon sellers
The largest opportunity for Indian brands. Skincare, Ayurveda supplements, herbal oils, and wellness products are the fastest-growing sub-categories. Natural and organic credentials are a purchase driver, not a niche.
Fashion & Apparel 28.7% of UK e-commerce revenue
Amazon fashion is growing at 12.4% CAGR. Sustainable and ethically made clothing commands a premium. Indian handloom, block-print, and artisan brands have a direct narrative advantage over fast fashion competitors.
Home & Kitchen 30% of Amazon sellers, Wayfair dominant
Home decor is the second-largest category on Amazon UK. Wayfair is the dedicated destination. Indian artisan homeware brass, cane, hand-painted ceramics sits exactly in the premium-but-affordable segment UK buyers are actively seeking.
Food & Beverages £19.45B market
Specialty food is growing 8% YoY. Indian teas, spice blends, healthy snacks, and functional beverages are entering mainstream UK retail. Waitrose and Whole Foods are actively expanding their Indian product ranges.

Five services. One partner. Everything handled.

Every service Wescayl offers is executed, not advised. We don't hand you a report and leave. We book the freight, file the customs, pick the orders, and run the campaigns with a named point of contact for each.

01 Compliance & Audit Regulatory ⌄

UK compliance is fundamentally different from India and getting it wrong means your shipment gets seized at the border with no warning. Before your first product reaches a UK shelf, Wescayl runs a full audit covering labelling requirements, certifications, ingredient restrictions, and packaging standards.

UK FSA Food Standards labelling, ingredients, allergens
UK Cosmetics Regulations SCPN notification, safety report
UKCA Marking replaces CE post-Brexit for most products
Trading Standards consumer safety, weights & measures
UK REACH chemical substance restrictions
Organic / Fairtrade Certification where applicable

Not sure which certifications your product needs? We assess this in the onboarding audit most brands are surprised by how few are actually required.

02 Freight Forwarding Logistics ⌄

Wescayl consolidates shipments from multiple Indian brands into a single consignment LCL consolidation. This gives every brand access to freight rates that only large-volume shippers normally see, without requiring a full container.

Brand A 2 CBM
Brand B 1.5 CBM
Brand C 3 CBM
Your brand X CBM
→
LCL ConsolBest rate, shared container
→
UK PortFelixstowe · Southampton

Consolidation typically reduces per-CBM freight cost by 20–35% vs. booking individually. Your goods are fully insured and tracked throughout.

03 3PL Fulfilment Operations ⌄

Wescayl provides dedicated warehouse space in the UK. Once your goods land, they move directly to our 3PL facility no middlemen, no delays. Every order placed on any of your UK channels is picked, packed, and dispatched same-day or next-day.

🚚
Goods received
Stock received, counted, and booked into inventory
📦
Storage
Palletised storage in UK warehouse, fully insured
📋
Pick & pack
Orders picked, packed to brand spec, labelled
🚚
Dispatch
Royal Mail, DPD, Evri fastest route to customer
↻
Returns
Processed, inspected, and restocked automatically
👤 Every brand gets an assigned UK operations contact not a ticket system.
04 Marketing Consultancy Growth Coming Soon ⌄

Wescayl connects brands to UK-based marketing professionals who have built and grown consumer brands in the British market. They develop a UK-specific marketing strategy covering channel strategy, brand positioning for a non-diaspora audience, retailer pitch materials, and PR introductions.

UK Go-to-Market strategy
Meta & TikTok UK campaigns
Amazon UK Ads management
UK PR & lifestyle press
Retailer pitch decks
Brand positioning for UK consumers

What works in India celebrity partnerships, WhatsApp marketing, regional influencers rarely translates directly. UK strategy is built from scratch for your specific category and price point.

05 Returns Management Operations ⌄

Returns are one of the highest hidden costs of UK e-commerce mismanaged, they erode margins fast. Wescayl turns your returns process into a cost-saving advantage: every return is inspected, repackaged where possible, and restocked automatically so nothing goes to waste.

📬
Return received
Customer returns arrive at our UK facility
🔍
Inspection
Items graded resaleable, repackageable, or written off
📦
Repackaging
Resaleable stock repackaged to brand spec
🔄
Restocked
Back into live inventory ready to sell again
📊
Reporting
Monthly returns report with reason codes and recovery rate
💡 Brands using Wescayl returns management recover an average of 60–70% of returned stock back into sellable inventory.
